2022-23 Missouri State Bears Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 17-15 (12-8, 6th in MVC MBB)

Coach: Dana Ford

PS/G: 65.6 (325th of 363)

PA/G: 63.2 (25th of 363)

SRS: 0.35 (154th of 363)

SOS: -1.00 (166th of 363)

ORtg: 102.9 (215th of 363)

DRtg: 99.1 (102nd of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
